input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.4.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.4.1.2
            TITLE: details of the manufacturing technique and/or composite layup technique as well as the

            CONTENT:
            rule F.4.1.2: Details of the manufacturing technique and/or composite layup technique as well as the
F.4.1.2 Details of the manufacturing technique and/or composite layup technique as well as the 
structural material used (examples - cloth type, weight, and resin type, number of layers, core 
material, and skin material if metal).

final_answer: rule F.4.1.2: Details of the manufacturing technique and/or composite layup technique as well as the F.4.1.2 Details of the manufacturing technique and/or composite layup technique as well as the structural material used (examples - cloth type, weight, and resin type, number of layers, core material, and skin material if metal).
